expectations.text: Response lists all four volumes of the Standard Works
expectations.evidence: Table shows all four: Holy Bible (KJV) 66 books, Book of Mormon 15 books, Doctrine and Covenants 138 sections, Pearl of Great Price 5 texts

expectations.text: Response explains the isLdsBibleRef routing decision
expectations.evidence: 'isLdsBibleRef(reference) checks the input against BIBLE_BOOK_PREFIXES' with full TypeScript code snippet showing the prefix-matching logic

expectations.text: Response mentions scriptures.nephi.org for non-Bible Standard Works
Response mentions the graceful fallback for LDS API unavailability
expectations.evidence: LdsApiUnavailableError class named and the exact fallback message quoted
